description: Implement a Java application to parse and analyze web server access logs using the provided 'log-analyzer' Maven project. Complete the 'LogParser.java' and 'LogAnalyzer.java' classes to parse Common Log Format lines from 'src/main/resources/access.log' and calculate traffic statistics, including total requests, unique hosts, and top paths. Ensure the implementation passes all unit tests and generates an analysis report at 'output/report.txt'.
